## rds

A powerful CLI toolkit for AWS RDS management

```
rds [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help             help for rds
  -p, --profile string   AWS profile to use (default "ackodev")
  -r, --region string    AWS Region (overrides config/env)
```
